titleStmt.title: SII 8.234: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 234. (A.R. No. 633 of 1902). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE BHAIRAVA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilaccelviyu n=tanakke yu
rimaipūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷūrccālai kalamaṟut
taruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu ṉuḷampapāṭiyu n=taṭikai
pāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai
pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum Iraṭṭapāṭi yeḻḻaraiyilakkamun
tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻi
yuḷ ḷellā yāṇṭuṉ toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait te
cukoḷ śrīkovirājakesaripanmarāṉa śrīrājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 5. Āva
tu Uṭaiyār śrīrājarājadevar mahādeviyār tan=ticattiviṭaṅkiyārāṉa śrīOlokamahā
deviyār Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭup pāmpūrnāṭṭut tirukkuṭamukkilpāl tiruvalañcuḻi
nām Eṭuppitta tirukkaṟṟaḷip piḷḷaiyār kṣetrapāladevarkku Attevar paṇṭārat
tu Irukkum poṉṉum tuṭar Oṉṟiṉāl poṉṉum kācum Uṭaiyār śrīrājarājadevar
tirumakaḷār vimalādittadevarmahādeviyār śrīkundavainaṅkaiyār Attevarkkuk kuṭut
ta poṉṉum poṉṉiṉ Ābharaṇaṅkaḷum Uṭaiyār śrīrājarājadevar tirumakaḷār naṭuvil⌈
peṇpiḷḷai naṅkaiyār mātevaṭikaḷār Uṭaiyār śrīrājarājadevarkku ĀṭiAruḷa prasādam pe
ṟṟa poṉnil ceytu varakkāṭṭina Ābharaṇaṅkaḷum kallil veṭṭuvikka venṟu Aruḷicce
yya Uṭaṉkūṭṭattuk karmmi kovalūruṭaiyāṉ kāṭaṉ ṉūṟṟeṇmaṉum kaṇkāṇik karaṇa
ttān nalluḻān Eṟaṉ Irāyaciṅkaṉum Irun=tu kalmel veṭṭuvittatu . piḷḷaiyārkṣe
trapāladevar paṇṭārattu nallūrp pūmi viṟṟateṉ ṟirukkum kiḻi Oṉṟiṉāl kuṭiñaikkallāl
pon niṟai nūṟṟuaṟu kaḻañce mukkāle yaraikkālum tuṭar Oṉṟiṉāl poṉ muppattiruka
ḻaiñce mukkālum Aṭṭittoḻuta poṟpūkka ḷuṭpaṭap poṟpūkkaḷāl poṉ Irukaḻañ
ce mukkāle Añcumāvum kācu nūṟṟukku māṟi mutalāṉa pon Aṟupattoṉpatin kaḻa
ñcaraiye Añcumāvum vimalādittadevar mahādeviyār śrīkundavainaṅkaiyār kuṭut
ta pon patiṉkaḻañcey mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭumāvum Ākak kuṭiñaikkallāl pon Iru
nūṟ ṟirupattiru kaḻañcāl ceyta śrīścandam Oṉṟiṉāl mukam Oṉṟum takaṭu panniraṇṭu
m Iṭaikkaṭṭup paṉṉiraṇṭil kaḷḷippū muppattāṟum tavaḷaivāy Oṉṟum cavakkam Oṉṟum
cavakkattil tāli muṉṟiṉāl paṭukaṇ Irupatteḻum kaḷḷippū muppatum muttil kotta māṅ
kāy Iraṇṭum Aracilaiy Oṉṟum takaṭṭukkuḻai nālum Āka kuṭiñaikkallāl niṟai
poṉ nāṟpatiṉ kaḻañcum Ūrddhvakecamum Uḷpaṭat tirumuṭi Oṉṟiṉāl poṉ ṉūṟṟe
ṇpattiru kaḻañcum Ākap poṉ Iruṉūṟṟaṟu Irupattiru kaḻañcum vimalādittadevar mahā
deviyār kundavaiynaṅkaiyār Ittevarkkey kuṭutta tiruvaraipaṭṭikaiy Oṉṟiṉā
l tavaḷaivā yiraṇṭum paṭukaṇ Eṭṭum kaḷḷippū Eḻum Aracilaiy Oṉṟum kokkuvāy O
ṉṟum Uḷpaṭap poṉ nāṟpattoṉpatiṉ kaḻañce mukkāle mañcāṭiyum Iraṇṭumā .
Uṭaiyār śrīrājarājadevar tirumakaḷār naṭuvilpiḷḷaiyār mātevaṭikaḷār Ittevar
kkey kuṭutta miṉukkan vaḷaiyil Iraṇṭināl pon ṉāṟpattoṉpatin kaḻañce Eḻu mañ
cāṭiyuṅ kunṟiyum meṟpaṭiyaāre varakkāṭṭina pon Araik kaḻañcey Araikkālināl ceyta po
ṟpū Onṟināl pon Araik kaḻañcey Araikkāl .
Digital edition of SII 8.234 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
